description: 3 hosts, shuffled split (v2, rebalanced). Genuinely different from default (apps and light services reshuffled) but mirrors default's HEAVY-cluster distribution so no single host is overloaded: spatial-stack co-located with solr/zk on host2 (as in default), big-data (pipelines/spark/hadoop) with cassandra on host3, CAS + light services + doi/data-quality on host1. v1 piled spatial+geo+bigdata+all-datastores on host3 and timed out the health gate (geonetwork/spatial-hub unhealthy) — see project_topology_3hostalt_result.
